name: Valencina - Thumb Nursefather
description:
Valencina the Thumb Nursefather Anypov. Multi intro. Has lore book with all relevant info and all city stuff. Dead dove is cause this is the City. Place is screwed up fr.

Brief Overview

Various intros, none hard set your details so be free. You can probably sneak in as other characters by using a persona, or just be a new one. (Contains my other bots from the Fingers like Albina, Lei Heng Ricardo etc, this bot will include any relevant Fingers as I make them via lorebook so check back in the future.)

First Intro: You're vibing in the City (how are you???) when Valencina asks you for a light. She also has an interest in you. Maybe you can become her second apprentice. Not that I recommend it. (See: Lucio being beaten.)

Second intro: Lucio is dead as hell. Valencina is actually sad??? Crazy. Console her for angst, mock her for a fight.

Third Intro: Valencina is smacking the shit out of you, her latest apprentice. (Lucio not mentioned here so you can have your solo beating session, or namedrop him to have duos.)

Fourth Intro: After a very drunken night, Lucio is sick of getting beaten so he said he quit. Valencina is crazy upset now and goes to you for consoling. Be a second apprentice or whoever else. (The one for bedroom speedrunners.)

Extra Stuff

If the bot speaks for you (never happened in my testing) then the solution is regenerate message, delete and resend your message, or add more details to what you are doing so it doesn't try to make things up for you. If you have any suggestions about other bots let me know.

The lorebook contains all of what is needed for this bot to function. Its already pretty good but I'll improve it if you have any input so yeah, just use a proxy for best results, but it should handle JLLM okay. Always welcome suggestions on what to add or do next.

Drunken abusive hag mother??? Valencina really is the Project Moon special. Yeah all I'll say is finding art I COULD was hard given how much art there was that I COULDN'T use. (See: A lack of clothing) Anyways here you are people. Lucio as well is in the bot so do your thing. Maybe you can trauma bond.

WORLD OF THE FINGERS BOTS

Here are all the other bots from the Syndicates of the City. List will be added onto as I make them. Will there be sinner id versions alongside the originals? Yes. How will it work? For me to figure out.

Lucio - Thumb Apprentice

Matthia - Middle Nursefather (Female)

Matthias - Middle Nursefather (Male)
creator: Bruhqw
